svg.font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
svg.text: Spring AI Alibaba Admin — Data Model (ER)
22 core tables · grouped by MySQL schema · solid = declared SQL FK · dashed = logical FK · all relationships shown as 1:N (parent → child)

g.text: Dashed container groups tables by MySQL schema (agentscope / admin)
Carries workspace_id (logical FK to workspace; arrow omitted to keep the diagram clean — see ws? for optional)
Declared SQL FK (ON DELETE CASCADE) · one parent ↔ many children
Logical FK by business id (joined in code, not enforced by DB)
Direction convention: arrows point from parent (the "1" side) toward child (the "N" side). The arrowhead lands on the FK-holding table.
Hub scoping: 11 agentscope tables carry workspace_id but only the application/application_component links are drawn explicitly; all others are marked with the "ws" badge to avoid arrow clutter.
Supporting tables omitted from this diagram (described in data-model.md): api_key, reference, prompt_build_template, evaluator_template, model_config; plus the in-code LimitEntity value object.
experiment also denormalizes dataset_id (cached alongside dataset_version_id) — the authoritative join is dataset_version → experiment shown here.
13 core tables · account, workspace, application[+version/+component], agent_schema, plugin/tool, knowledge_base/document, provider/model, mcp_server
9 core tables · prompt[+version], dataset[+version/+item], evaluator[+version], experiment[+result]
